title: Layout Managers, Resize, Scaling, High DPI, and Reflow · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed puzzle review reconstructs layout managers, resize, scaling, high dpi, and reflow from revision, configuration, seed, topology, frontier, predecessor map, state transition, draw record, accessibility report, profile, artifact, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for responsive desktop layout and resize policy after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use one geometry manager per parent and configure grid weights, sticky behavior, minimum sizes, and padding intentionally.
Derive cell size and offsets from current available space, grid dimensions, minimum target, and aspect policy.
Handle configure events with bounded coalescing and redraw only from committed current dimensions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

steps.title: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Separate evidence from confidence · Review Small Window Recovery
steps.instruction:
review case — A review puzzle team handles case 2829 during a corrupted-state recovery drill. Build deterministic Python evidence to derive a responsive cell scale while retaining visible controls and valid geometry; event-loop work must remain cancellable; then inject one invalid wall, stale callback, or corrupted field and reject it. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Small Window Recovery, keep Small Window Recovery connected to executable Python grid, topology, search, event, state, accessibility, package, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Provide a usable minimum, scroll or alternate representation, and reversible recovery when the visual grid cannot fit.

hints: For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Small Window Recovery, name the player, revision, Python, Tcl and Tk versions, grid, coordinate, seed, topology, frontier, path, event, state, render, accessibility, package, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Small Window Recovery precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Small Window Recovery, trace this concrete input and predict coordinate, wall, topology, frontier, route, callback, transition, render, accessibility, failure, rollback, recovery, and native evidence before reviewing it: A review puzzle team handles case 6258 during a low-vision player session. Build deterministic Python evidence to derive a responsive cell scale while retaining visible controls and valid geometry; the prior good state must survive failure; then change display scale and retain focus and control access. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Provide a usable minimum, scroll or alternate representation, and reversible recovery when the visual grid cannot fit.

For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Small Window Recovery, challenge the documented misconception with changed-grid, seed, wall, generator, solver, weight, heuristic, callback, state, focus, scale, save, package, recovery, and controlled native-transfer evidence: Clipping controls is acceptable for unusually small windows.
